title: toast’s Ultimate RPG - ULTRPG
description: Adventure, fight, use magic and save the overworld! (Fabric 1.20.1)
body:
THANKS FOR 800 DOWNLOADS! REVAMP COMING SOON PROMISE!!


This is toast's ULTIMATE rpg, a light-but-epic modpack with a focus on exploration, structures, combat and magic! A storyline is planned to come IF possible, but for now, here's everything before the story!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

credits for those who need them:

Mob Origins (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-origins) [1.11.1] by UltrusBot

Mandala's GUI - Dark mode (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) [MandalasGUI_v3.1+Darkmode [Vanilla]] by cesar_zorak

Thanks for supporting me by downloading, I mean it

</details>
